# Supported Data Types

## Workouts

Export workouts and associated metadata. Some data may be limited to specific workout types.

- Total Energy
- Active Energy
- Heart Rate
- Heart Rate Recovery
- Distance
- Pace
- Speed
- Workout Route
- Temperature
- Workout Intensity
- Swimming Stoke Count
- Step Count
- Cadence
- Pace
- Workout Intensity (MET)
- Elevation
- Weather Metadata
- SWOLF Score

## Health Metrics

The following is the full list of support health metrics.

### Activity

- Active Energy Burned
- Apple Exercise Time
- Apple Stand Hour
- Apple Stand Time
- Basal Energy Burned
- Cycling Cadence
- Cycling Distance
- Cycling Functional Threshold Power
- Cycling Speed
- Downhill Snow Sports Distance
- Flights Climbed
- Physical Effort
- Running Power
- Running Speed
- Step Count
- Swimming Stroke Count
- Swimming Distance
- VO2 Max
- Underwater Depth
- Walking + Running Distance
- Wheelchair Distance
- Wheelchair Push Count

### Body Measurements

- Body Fat Percentage
- Body Mass
- Body Mass Index
- Height
- Lean Body Mass
- Waist Circumference
- Wrist Temperature

### Heart

- Cardio Recovery
- Blood Pressure (Systolic/Diastolic)
- Heart Rate
- Heart Rate Variability
- High Heart Rate Notifications
- Irregular Heart Rate Notifications
- Low Heart Rate Notifications
- Resting Heart Rate
- Walking Average Heart Rate

### Hearing

- Environmental Audio Exposure
- Headphone Audio Exposure 

### Nutrition

- Dietary Energy
- Dietary Sugar
- Dietary Cholesterol
- Dietary Water
- Dietary Biotin
- Dietary Caffeine
- Calcium
- Chloride
- Chromium
- Copper
- Fiber
- Folate
- Iodine
- Iron
- Magnesium
- Manganese
- Molybdenum
- Monounsaturated Fat
- Niacin
- Pantothenic Acid
- Polyunsaturated Fat
- Potassium
- Protein
- Riboflavin
- Saturated Fat
- Selenium
- Sodium
- Thiamin
- Total Fat
- Vitamin A
- Vitamin C
- Vitamin D
- Vitamin E
- Vitamin K
- Zinc

### Mindfulness

- Mindfulness Session

### Mobility

- Six-Minute Walking Test Distance
- Stair Speed Up
- Stair Speed Down
- Walking Speed
- Walking Step Length
- Walking Asymmetry Percentage
- Walking Double Support Percentage

### Reproductive Health

- Sexual Activity

### Respiratory

- Blood Oxygen Saturation 
- Forced Expiratory Volume
- Forced Vital Capacity 
- Inhaler Usage

### Sleep

- Sleep Analysis (Asleep/In Bed)

### Vitals

- Basal Body Temperature
- Blood Glucose
- Body Temperature
- Insulin Delivery
- Peripheral Perfusion

### Other

- Alcohol Consumption
- Blood Alcohol Content
- Electrodermal Activity
- Handwashing
- Number of Times Fallen
- Time in Daylight
- Toothbrushing
- Underwater Temperature
- UV Exposure
